The Switch has 8 × RJ-45 ports that facilitate connection with network elements. The switch dimensions are 226 × 131 × 35mm. QoS aka Quality of Service technology ensures the switch doesn't get overloaded,  and it also lets you set up end station priority. The TP-Link device includes PoE technology that provides power and signal connection to end devices with a single LAN cable. The switch weighs 1150g.
